candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Exact reported total current assets label.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred for CHE.
Cash balance label, but less standard/preferred than explicit cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash at the end of the year
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement ending cash, not preferred when balance-sheet cash line exists.

variables.notes: Priority list reflects label changes over time: prefer explicit 'Cash and cash equivalents'; use 'Cash in Hand & with Banks' when that is the reported balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Exact reported total current liabilities label.

candidates.why: Direct short-term debt label; preferred if it represents the total current borrowings.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Current maturities of long-term debt excluding leases; fits STD baseline definition and avoids lease liabilities.
Represents current maturities within one year; valid fallback/component if clean current borrowings total is unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Selected minimal non-lease financing current debt set. Excluded lease rows per rule. Did not include 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid possible double counting with 'Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases'.

candidates.why: Direct tax payable/current tax liability label on balance sheet.
Best balance-sheet PPE line; total net PPE is preferred.
Gross PPE exists but net total is preferred for PPEGT.

variables.notes: Chose total net PPE, which is preferred over gross or accumulated depreciation lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

variables.notes: Exact operating cash flow line from cash flow statement.
